Items.Item: Rarity: UNIQUE Militant Faith Timeless Jewel Unique ID: a31c78de500cf2c9dc4f57f28bbcd3c02369552b91217c5af5a2b63ec3f3654f Item Level: 84 Radius: Large Implicits: 0 Carved to glorify 8310 new faithful converted by High Templar Dominus Passives in radius are Conquered by the Templars 1% increased effect of Non-Curse Auras per 10 Devotion 3% increased Effect of non-Damaging Ailments on Enemies per 10 Devotion Historic

Rarity: UNIQUE Asenath's Gentle Touch Silk Gloves Energy Shield: 28 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 1 Unique ID: 9f8fa06fe24e340c7586045e03e80476375b42e074a7cc71526cf1b1d4deeea1 Item Level: 80 Quality: 20 Sockets: G-B-B-R LevelReq: 25 Implicits: 2 +1 to Maximum Frenzy Charges +0.8% to Spell Critical Strike Chance +24 to Intelligence +65 to maximum Life +72 to maximum Mana Curse Enemies with Temporal Chains on Hit Non-Aura Curses you inflict are not removed from Dying Enemies Enemies near corpses affected by your Curses are Blinded Enemies Killed near corpses affected by your Curses explode, dealing 3% of their Life as Physical Damage Corrupted

Rarity: UNIQUE Mageblood Heavy Belt LevelReq: 44 Implicits: 1 {tags:jewellery_attribute}{range:1}+(25-35) to Strength {tags:jewellery_attribute}{range:0.5}+(30-50) to Dexterity {tags:jewellery_resistance}{range:0.5}+(15-25)% to Fire Resistance {tags:jewellery_resistance}{range:0.5}+(15-25)% to Cold Resistance Magic Utility Flask cannot be Used {range:0.5}Leftmost (2-4) Magic Utility Flasks constantly apply their Flask Effects to you Magic Utility Flask Effects cannot be removed
